---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new simulation, KQL query, or deployment scenario
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like added?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Use case**
Why is this useful? What scenario does it address?

**Proposed approach**
If you have ideas on implementation, describe them here.

**Additional context**
Links to Microsoft documentation, related alerts, or other references.
